---
title: "TODO"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## functions to add

1.  ability to deal with NAs in data\$OTU

2.  Function to generate dataset

3.  vignette data to fill in `spatCovariates` and `traitsMatrix`

4.  ability to do model selection for the number of factors `n_factors`
    . The following was the original chunk, when occPlus used STAN:

## Model selection

Model selection for the different factors $d$ can be done using the
`loo` package.

```{r, eval = FALSE}
library(loo)

fitmodel2  <- runOccPlus(data,
                        listParams = list(n_factors = 3, 
                                          gt = 0),
                        occCovariates = c("X_psi.1", "X_psi.2"),
                        collCovariates = c("X_theta"),
                        MCMCparams = list(nchain = 2,
                                          nburn = 500,
                                          niter = 500)
                        );beepr::beep()

log_lik1 <- extract_log_lik(fitmodel$vb_fit)
log_lik2 <- extract_log_lik(fitmodel2$vb_fit)

loo1 <- loo(log_lik1)
loo1 <- loo(log_lik2)

comparison <- loo_compare(loo1, loo2)
print(comparison) # The model with elpd_diff equal to 0 is the one to be preferred
```
